_note: DUMMY DATA — replace with real content from your Index card / Codex

stratagems.name: [DUMMY] Plague Cloud
stratagems.when: DUMMY: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: DUMMY: One Death Guard Infantry unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: DUMMY: Until the end of the phase, ranged attacks made by models in that unit have +1 Strength.

stratagems.name: [DUMMY] Contagion Surge
stratagems.when: DUMMY: When an enemy unit is destroyed by a Death Guard unit.
stratagems.target: DUMMY: One friendly Death Guard unit within 6" of that destroyed unit.
stratagems.effect: DUMMY: That unit may immediately make a free Normal Move of up to 3".
stratagems.restrictions: DUMMY: Cannot be used more than once per turn.

stratagems.name: [DUMMY] Virulent Swarm
stratagems.when: DUMMY: Start of your Fight phase.
stratagems.target: DUMMY: One Death Guard unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: DUMMY: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit gain the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: [DUMMY] Festering Advance
stratagems.when: DUMMY: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: DUMMY: One Death Guard unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: DUMMY: That unit can Advance and still be eligible to shoot this turn.

stratagems.name: [DUMMY] Bloated Resilience
stratagems.when: DUMMY: When an enemy unit targets a Death Guard unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: DUMMY: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
stratagems.restrictions: DUMMY: Cannot be used if the unit already has an invulnerable save of 4+ or better.

stratagems.name: [DUMMY] Rot Spores
stratagems.when: DUMMY: When an enemy unit destroys a Death Guard model in your army.
stratagems.target: DUMMY: The enemy unit that destroyed that model.
stratagems.effect: DUMMY: Roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
